utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , this life ! Oh okay no , Chandler is worse .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Man , it must be so cool remembering stuff like that ! I do not have any past life memories .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I do not have any past life memories .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Of course you do not sweetie . You are brand new .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , let not tell this story .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh no , I know ! I know ! It is the one where Joey got Monica turkey stuck on his head !

utterances.text: What ? ! Joey got a turkey stuck on his head ? !

utterances.text: Hey , it is not like it sounds .
